title: Plague
description: Makes Poison and Wither spread like the Plauge.
body:
When hitting someone with the plauge, your target gets it too!

Plauge Doctor Armor: While wearing the helmet, you are unable to get infected. Additonally, you cannot get poison or wither if you have the full set (still take 1 tick of damage as a balance).

Credits to Turtlous for the Armor textures (Skin was converted to armor and Hue and Saturation edited)
